verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez:
በሎሙ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ወለደቂቁ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይትዐቀቡ ፡ እምቅድሳቶሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወኢያርኵ[ሱ] ፡ ስምየ ፡ ቅዱሰ
                  ፡ በኵሉ ፡ ዘይቄድሱ ፡ ሊተ ፡ አነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: Speak to Aaron and to his sons, and let them take heed concerning the holy things of the children of Israel, so they shall not profane my holy name in any of the things which they consecrate to me: I am the Lord.
translations.kjv: Speak unto Aaron and to his sons, that they separate themselves from the holy things of the children of Israel, and that they profane not my holy name in those things which they hallow unto me: I am the LORD.

verses.geez:
ዘእቤሎሙ ፡ በመዋዕሊክሙ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ዘይበውእ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቅድሳት ፡ ዘእምነ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ዘርእክሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ
                  ፡ ዘይቄድሱ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ እንዘ ፡ ርኵሱ ፡ ላዕሌሁ ፡ ለትሠሮ ፡ ይእቲ ፡ ነፍስ ፡ እምኔየ ፡
                  እስመ ፡ አነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: Say to them, Every man throughout your generations, whoever of all your seed shall approach to the holy things, whatsoever the children of Israel shall consecrate to the Lord, while his uncleanness is upon him, that soul shall be cut off from me: I am the Lord your God.
translations.kjv: Say unto them, Whosoever he be of all your seed among your generations, that goeth unto the holy things, which the children of Israel hallow unto the LORD, having his uncleanness upon him, that soul shall be cut off from my presence: I am the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወለእመቦ ፡ ብእሴ ፡ እምዘርአ ፡ አሮን ፡ ዘለምጽ ፡ አው ፡ ዘይትከዐዎ ፡ ዘርኡ ፡ ኢይብላዕ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ዘቅድሳት ፡
                  እስካ ፡ አመ ፡ ይነጽሕ ፤ ወዘገሰሰ ፡ እምኵሉ ፡ ር[ኵሰ] ፡ ነፍስ ፡ ወእመኒ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ዘወፅአ ፡ እምኔሁ ፡ ዘርኡ ፤

translations.lxx: And the man of the seed of Aaron the priest, if he should have leprosy or issue of the reins, shall not eat of the holy things, until he be cleansed; and he that touches any uncleanness of a dead body, or the man whose seed of copulation shall have gone out from him,
translations.kjv: What man soever of the seed of Aaron is a leper, or hath a running issue; he shall not eat of the holy things, until he be clean. And whoso toucheth any thing that is unclean by the dead, or a man whose seed goeth from him;

verses.geez: አው ፡ ዘገሰሰ ፡ እምኵሉ ፡ ዘይትሐወስ ፡ ዘያረኵስ ፡ ዘርኩስ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ርኵስ ፤

translations.lxx: or whosoever shall touch any unclean reptile, which will defile him, or who shall touch a man, whereby he shall defile him according to all his uncleanness:
translations.kjv: Or whosoever toucheth any creeping thing, whereby he may be made unclean, or a man of whom he may take uncleanness, whatsoever uncleanness he hath;

verses.geez:
ነፍስ ፡ እንተ ፡ ገሰሰቶ ፡ ርኵስት ፡ ይእቲ ፡ እስከ ፡ ሰርክ ፡ ወኢይብላዕ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ዘቅድሳት ፡ ለእመ ፡
                  ኢተኀፅበ ፡ ሥጋሁ ፡ በማይ ።

translations.lxx: whatsoever soul shall touch them shall be unclean until evening; he shall not eat of the holy things, unless he bathe his body in water,
translations.kjv: The soul which hath touched any such shall be unclean until even, and shall not eat of the holy things, unless he wash his flesh with water.

verses.geez:
ወእምከመ ፡ ዐረበት ፡ ፀሓይ ፡ ንጹሕ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወይእተ ፡ ጊዜ ፡ ይብላዕ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ዘቅድሳት ፡ እስመ ፡ ሲሳዩ ፡
                  ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: and the sun go down, and then he shall be clean; and then shall he eat of all the holy things, for they are his bread.
translations.kjv: And when the sun is down, he shall be clean, and shall afterward eat of the holy things; because it is his food.

verses.geez: ወምውተ ፡ ወብላዐ ፡ አርዌ ፡ ኢትብልዑ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢትርኰሱ ፡ ቦቱ ፡ እስመ ፡ አነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: He shall not eat that which dies of itself, or is taken of beasts, so that he should be polluted by them: I am the Lord.
translations.kjv: That which dieth of itself, or is torn with beasts, he shall not eat to defile himself therewith: I am the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወዕቀቡ ፡ ትእዛዝየ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢይኩንክሙ ፡ በእንቲአሁ ፡ ኀጢአተ ፡ ወከመ ፡ ኢ[ት]ሙቱ ፡ በእንቲአሁ ፡ ወለእመ ፡
                  (ኢ)ረኵሱ ፡ ቦቱ ፡ አነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ዘእቄድሶሙ ።

translations.lxx: And they shall keep my ordinances, that they do not bear iniquity because of them, and die because of them, if they shall profane them: I am the Lord God that sanctifies them.
translations.kjv: They shall therefore keep mine ordinance, lest they bear sin for it, and die therefore, if they profane it: I the LORD do sanctify them.

verses.geez:
ወኵሉ ፡ ዘእምባዕድ ፡ ዘመድ ፡ ኢይብላዕ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ዘቅድሳት ፡ ኀደርቱኒ ፡ ለካህን ፡ ወገባእቱ ፡ ኢይብላዕ ፡
                  እምውስተ ፡ ቅድሳት ።

translations.lxx: And no stranger shall eat the holy things: one that sojourns with a priest, or a hireling, shall not eat the holy things.
translations.kjv: There shall no stranger eat of the holy thing: a sojourner of the priest, or an hired servant, shall not eat of the holy thing.

verses.geez:
ወለእመሰቦ ፡ ዘአጥረየ ፡ ካህን ፡ ነፍሰ ፡ ዘተሳየጠ ፡ በወርቁ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ለይብላዕ ፡ እስመ ፡ ሲሳዩ ፡ ውእቱ ፡
                  ወልድኒ ፡ ዘቤቱ ፡ እሙንቱኒ ፡ ይብልዑ ፡ ሲሳዮሙ ፡ ውእቱ ።

translations.lxx: But if a priest should have a soul purchased for money, he shall eat of his bread; and they that are born in his house, they also shall eat of his bread.
translations.kjv: But if the priest buy any soul with his money, he shall eat of it, and he that is born in his house: they shall eat of his meat.

verses.geez:
ወወለተ ፡ ብእሲኒ ፡ ካህን ፡ ለእመ ፡ አውሰበት ፡ ብእሴ ፡ ዘእምነ ፡ ካልእ ፡ ዘመድ ፡ ኢትብላዕ ፡ ይእቲኒ ፡ እምውስተ
                  ፡ ዓሥራት ፡ ዘቅድሳት ።

translations.lxx: And if the daughter of a priest should marry a stranger, she shall not eat of the offerings of the sanctuary.
translations.kjv: If the priest’s daughter also be married unto a stranger, she may not eat of an offering of the holy things.

verses.geez:
ወወለተ ፡ ካህን ፡ ለእመ ፡ ኮነት ፡ መበለተ ፡ ወኀደጋ ፡ ምታ ፡ ለትግባእ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ቤተ ፡ አቡሃ ፡ ከመ ፡ አመ ፡
                  ንስቲታ ፡ ወለትብላዕ ፡ እምሲሳየ ፡ አቡሃ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ዘእምነ ፡ ባዕድ ፡ ዘመድ ፡ ኢይብላዕ ፡ እምኔሁ ።

translations.lxx: And if the daughter of a priest should be a widow, or put away, and have no seed, she shall return to her father's house, as in her youth: she shall eat of her father's bread, but no stranger shall eat of it.
translations.kjv: But if the priest’s daughter be a widow, or divorced, and have no child, and is returned unto her father’s house, as in her youth, she shall eat of her father’s meat: but there shall no stranger eat thereof.

verses.geez:
ወለእመቦ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ዘበልዐ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ዘቅድሳት ፡ በኢያእምሮ ፡ ይዌስክ ፡ ኃምስተ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ላዕሌሁ ፡ ወይሁቦ ፡
                  ለካህን ፡ ዘቅድሳት ።

translations.lxx: And the man who shall ignorantly eat holy things, shall add the fifth part to it, and give the holy thing to the priest.
translations.kjv: And if a man eat of the holy thing unwittingly, then he shall put the fifth part thereof unto it, and shall give it unto the priest with the holy thing.

verses.geez: ወኢያርኵሱ ፡ ቅድሳቶሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ዘያመጽኡ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And they shall not profane the holy things of the children of Israel, which they offer to the Lord.
translations.kjv: And they shall not profane the holy things of the children of Israel, which they offer unto the LORD;

verses.geez:
ወይከውኖሙ ፡ ኀጢአተ ፡ ንስሓ ፡ ላዕሌሆሙ ፡ እምከመ ፡ በልዑ ፡ ቅድሳቶሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ አነ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡
                  ዘይቄድሶሙ ።

translations.lxx: So should they bring upon themselves the iniquity of trespass in their eating their holy things: for I am the Lord that sanctifies them.
translations.kjv: Or suffer them to bear the iniquity of trespass, when they eat their holy things: for I the LORD do sanctify them.

verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez:
ንግሮሙ ፡ ለአሮን ፡ ወለደቂቁ ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ ተዓይነ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ [*ወበሎሙ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ እምደቂቀ ፡
                  እስራኤል ፡*] አው ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ግዩራን ፡ እለ ፡ ሀለዉ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ዘአምጽአ ፡ ቍርባኖ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡
                  ዘበፅዑ ፡ አው ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ዘሐለዩ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘያመጽኡ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፤

translations.lxx: Speak to Aaron and his sons, and to all the congregation of Israel, and thou shalt say to them, Any man of the children of Israel, or of the strangers that abide among them in Israel, who shall offer his gifts according to all their confession and according to all their choice, whatsoever they may bring to the Lord for whole-burnt-offerings—
translations.kjv: Speak unto Aaron, and to his sons, and unto all the children of Israel, and say unto them, Whatsoever he be of the house of Israel, or of the strangers in Israel, that will offer his oblation for all his vows, and for all his freewill offerings, which they will offer unto the LORD for a burnt offering;

verses.geez:
እምውስተ ፡ ዘይኄይስ ፡ ይኩን ፡ ተባዕተ ፡ ንጹሐ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ መራዕይ ፡ ወእምውስተ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ወእምውስተ ፡ አጣሊ
                  ።

translations.lxx: your free-will-offerings shall be males without blemish of the herds, or of the sheep, or of the goats.
translations.kjv: Ye shall offer at your own will a male without blemish, of the beeves, of the sheep, or of the goats.

verses.geez: ኵሉ ፡ ዘቦቱ ፡ ነውረ ፡ ላዕሌሁ ፡ ኢያምጽእዎ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ እስመ ፡ ኢይሰጠወክሙ ።

translations.lxx: They shall not bring to the Lord anything that has a blemish in it, for it shall not be acceptable for you.
translations.kjv: But whatsoever hath a blemish, that shall ye not offer: for it shall not be acceptable for you.

verses.geez:
ወብእሲኒ ፡ ለእመቦ ፡ ዘአምጽአ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ መድኀኒት ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ በእንተ ፡ ዘበፅዐ ፡ አው ፡ በፈቃዱ ፡
                  እምውስተ ፡ መራዕይ ፡ አው ፡ እምውስተ ፡ አባግዕ ፡ ንጹሐ ፡ ይኩን ፡ ዘይሰጠዎሙ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘአልቦቱ ፡ ነውረ ፡ ላዕሌሁ ።

translations.lxx: And whatsoever man shall offer a peace-offering to the Lord, discharging a vow, or in the way of free-will-offering, or an offering in your feasts, of the herds or of the sheep, it shall be without blemish for acceptance: there shall be no blemish in it.
translations.kjv: And whosoever offereth a sacrifice of peace offerings unto the LORD to accomplish his vow, or a freewill offering in beeves or sheep, it shall be perfect to be accepted; there shall be no blemish therein.

verses.geez:
ወዕው[ረ]ሰ ፡ አው ፡ ስቡ[ረ] ፡ አው ፡ ምቱረ ፡ ልሳን ፡ አው ፡ ሕሱፈ ፡ አው ፡ ዕቡቀ ፡ አው ፡ ዘጽርንእተ ፡ ቦቱ
                  ፡ ላዕሌሁ ፡ ዘንተ ፡ ኢያመጽኡ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ወለቍርባንኒ ፡ ኢተሀቡ ፡ እምኔሆሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምሥዋዑ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: One that is blind, or broken, or has its tongue cut out, or is troubled with warts, or has a malignant ulcer, or tetters, they shall not offer these to the Lord; neither shall ye offer any of them for a burnt-offering on the altar of the Lord.
translations.kjv: Blind, or broken, or maimed, or having a wen, or scurvy, or scabbed, ye shall not offer these unto the LORD, nor make an offering by fire of them upon the altar unto the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወላህመኒ ፡ አው ፡ በግዐ ፡ ዘምቱረ ፡ እዝን ፡ አው ፡ ዘምቱረ ፡ ዘነብ ፡ ተኀትሞ ፡ ወለጥሪተ ፡ ርእስከ ፡ ትሬስዮ ፡
                  ወለብፅዓቲከሰ ፡ ኢይሰጠወከ ።

translations.lxx: And a calf or a sheep with the ears cut off, or that has lost its tail, thou shalt slay them for thyself; but they shall not be accepted for thy vow.
translations.kjv: Either a bullock or a lamb that hath any thing superfluous or lacking in his parts, that mayest thou offer for a freewill offering; but for a vow it shall not be accepted.

verses.geez: ዘጽንጰው ፡ ወዘፅቱም ፡ ወዘምቱር ፡ ወዘአጥራቂ ፡ ኢያምጽእዎ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ወበምድርክሙኒ ፡ ኢትግበርዎ ።

translations.lxx: That which has broken testicles, or is crushed or gelt or mutilated,—thou shalt not offer them to the Lord, neither shall ye sacrifice them upon your land.
translations.kjv: Ye shall not offer unto the LORD that which is bruised, or crushed, or broken, or cut; neither shall ye make any offering thereof in your land.

verses.geez:
ወእምኀበ ፡ ባዕድኒ ፡ ዘመዱ ፡ ኢታብኡ ፡ ዘከመዝ ፡ ቍርባነ ፡ ለአምላክክሙ ፡ እምኵሉ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ እስመ ፡ ሙሱን ፡
                  ውእቱ ፡ ወነውረ ፡ ቦቱ ፡ ላዕሌሁ ፡ ወኢይሰጠወክምዎ ፡ ለዝንቱ ።

translations.lxx: Neither shall ye offer the gifts of your God of all these things by the hand of a stranger, because there is corruption in them, a blemish in them: these shall not be accepted for you.
translations.kjv: Neither from a stranger’s hand shall ye offer the bread of your God of any of these; because their corruption is in them, and blemishes be in them: they shall not be accepted for you.

verses.geez: ወነበቦ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለሙሴ ፡ ወይቤሎ ፤

translations.lxx: And the Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
translations.kjv: And the LORD spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.geez:
ለእመ ፡ ወለደት ፡ እጐልት ፡ አው ፡ በግዕት ፡ አው ፡ ጠሊት ፡ ሰቡዐ ፡ ዕለተ ፡ የሀሉ ፡ እጓላ ፡ ኀበ ፡ እሙ ፡
                  ወአመ ፡ ሳምንት ፡ ዕለት ፡ ወእምድኅሬሁኒ ፡ ይሰጠወክሙ ፡ ለቍርባነ ፡ መሥዋዕቱ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: As for a calf, or a sheep, or a goat, whenever it is born, then shall it be seven days under its mother; and on the eighth day and after they shall be accepted for sacrifices, a burnt-offering to the Lord.
translations.kjv: When a bullock, or a sheep, or a goat, is brought forth, then it shall be seven days under the dam; and from the eighth day and thenceforth it shall be accepted for an offering made by fire unto the LORD.

verses.geez: ወኢትጠብሑ ፡ እጐልተ ፡ አው ፡ በግዕተ ፡ ምስለ ፡ እጓላ ፡ በአሐቲ ፡ ዕለት ።

translations.lxx: And a bullock and a ewe, it and its young, thou shalt not kill in one day.
translations.kjv: And whether it be cow or ewe, ye shall not kill it and her young both in one day.

verses.geez: ወለእመ ፡ ሦዕከ ፡ መሥዋዕተ ፡ ብፅዓተ ፡ ትፍሥሕትከ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ዘይሠጠወክሙ ፡ ሡዑ ፡ ሎቱ ።

translations.lxx: And if thou shouldest offer a sacrifice, a vow of rejoicing to the Lord, ye shall offer it so as to be accepted for you.
translations.kjv: And when ye will offer a sacrifice of thanksgiving unto the LORD, offer it at your own will.

verses.geez: ወበይእቲ ፡ ዕለት ፡ ይብልዕዎ ፡ ወኢያትርፉ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ሥጋሁ ፡ ለነግህ ፡ እስመ ፡ አነ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: In that same day it shall be eaten; ye shall not leave of the flesh till the morrow: I am the Lord.
translations.kjv: On the same day it shall be eaten up; ye shall leave none of it until the morrow: I am the LORD.

verses.geez: ወዕቀቡ ፡ ትእዛዝየ ፡ ወግበርዎ ፡ እስመ ፡ አነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall keep my commandments and do them.
translations.kjv: Therefore shall ye keep my commandments, and do them: I am the LORD.

verses.geez:
ወኢታርኵሱ ፡ ስመ ፡ ቅዱሰ ፡ ወእትቄደስ ፡ በማእከሎሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እስመ ፡ አነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡
                  ዘይቄድሶሙ ፤

translations.lxx: And ye shall not profane the name of the Holy One, and I will be sanctified in the midst of the children of Israel. I am the Lord that sanctifies you,
translations.kjv: Neither shall ye profane my holy name; but I will be hallowed among the children of Israel: I am the LORD which hallow you,

verses.geez: ዘአውፃእክዎሙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ ከመ ፡ እኩንክሙ ፡ አምላክክሙ ፡ አነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: who brought you out of the land of Egypt, to be your God: I am the Lord.
translations.kjv: That brought you out of the land of Egypt, to be your God: I am the LORD.
